electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 143 dB peak at 1 m, half-space, pink noise crest factor 10 dB, [dV-S_X] preset (datasheet rev. dVS_SP_EN_1.0/02-09). User Manual p.142 freefield figures by element count: 1 enclosure 133 dB cont / 139 dB peak; 2 enclosures 139 / 145; 4 enclosures 145 / 151. Sensitivity 104.5 dB SPL (2.83 Vrms at 1 m, 40-200 Hz, no EQ).
electroacoustic.directivity: Omni-directional as a single element; in a line source the dV-SUB column becomes front-polarized (dipole effect) with directivity scaling by element count. Frequency response 40-200 Hz (+/-3 dB); usable bandwidth 35-200 Hz (35 Hz low limit at -10 dB).
electroacoustic.components: Single-section subwoofer: 3 x 15" weather-resistant LF transducers (3" edgewound copper-ribbon voice coil, die-cast aluminium basket) loaded in a dual-chamber vented bandpass enclosure (two side-firing 15" wired in polarity opposition pressurising the central chamber). No MF, no HF. RMS power handling 1200 W (4800 W peak).

operating_modes: single-section passive subwoofer (one SB amplifier output drives the 2.7 ohm load; classified as an SB channel)
hybrid combined dV-DOSC + dV-SUB drive from one controller (one SB channel for the sub, remaining outputs for the dV-DOSC LF/HF)
amplification.per_amplifier_note: LA8 manual Table 3 (Enclosure drive capacity per LA8): dV-SUB = 1 connection per output / 4 enclosures per controller (i.e. 1 per output, 4 total per LA8). The 2.7 ohm load sits at the amplifier minimum-impedance floor, so one sub already loads a channel pair and the maximum is 4 per LA8. The 2009 datasheet specifies the LA8 as the dedicated controller; the current Preset Guide v5.5.1 also publishes dV-SUB presets for LA4, LA4X, LA8 and LA12X. Legacy 2005-era drive was the LA48 amplifier with the COMB/DOSUB connector system.
amplification.preset_note: [dV-S_X] (LPF 200 Hz) is the reference preset and the one the datasheet's 143 dB / 1200 W figures reference; [dV-S_60_X] adds a 60 Hz HPF, both optimised to pair with the V-DOSC/dV-DOSC [_X] presets. [dV-S_100] / [dV-S_60_100] cross over at 100 Hz for compact tops. The hybrid [dV_dV-S_LO/HI/LO60/HI60] presets cross dV-DOSC + dV-SUB at 100 Hz from a single controller. Legacy 2005 LA48-era names were dV 3W 120/200/80 dVS LO/HI.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point speakON (NL4), wired 1+/1-. A single socket is provided deliberately to prevent daisy-chaining multiple subs (paralleling would drop the load below the 2.7 ohm floor); there is no link/through connector and each dV-SUB is fed individually.
connection.breakouts: Legacy cabling shared with SB218: sub cable DOSUB (8-pin CA-COM to 4x speakON), optionally with sub extension DO10P, to connect dV-SUB to the legacy amplifier racks. With modern LA8/LA4X/LA12X a standard NL4 speakON cable is used.

physical.weight_note: 93 kg / 205 lb net; shipping weight 107 kg / 235.9 lb including the dV-SUBPLA pallet/cover.
physical.protection_rating: N/A - no IP ingress-protection rating is published for this enclosure; transducers are described only as weather-resistant / corrosion-treated.
physical.cabinet: 24 mm Baltic birch plywood (sealed, screwed, rabbeted angles, internally braced); Maroon-gray finish (datasheet rev 1.0 also cites RAL 8019 grayish-brown). Black epoxy-coated perforated steel grille with acoustically transparent foam. Integral polyester-coated steel flying hardware and integrated handles.

modes: flown on top of a dV-DOSC array (dV-SUB is always flown above, never below)
ground-stacked on integral runners with dV-ANGLESS sub-to-sub bars
deployment.max_per_flown_array: Steel certification (datasheet): 12 dV-DOSC + 4 dV-SUB on a single pick point (no extension bar), or 9 dV-DOSC + 3 dV-SUB on a dual pick point with extension bar. dV-SUB-only arrays rated up to 6 deep (6-deep total 552 kg / 1217 lb).
deployment.inter_element_angles: 0 deg between dV-SUB elements (a sub column is a coupled block); splay angles (0/-2/-3.75/-5.5/-7.5 deg) apply to the dV-DOSC elements below via dV-ANGLEP1/P2, not between the subs.
rigging_accessories: dV-ANGLESDP (rear-point angle bar for dV-DOSC under dV-SUB)
dV-PIN25 (25 mm locking quick-release coupling pin)
dV-PIN81 (81 mm locking pin for dV-DOWN)

usage: Discontinued LF-extension subwoofer for the dV-DOSC compact line source, extending the system down to 35 Hz (-10 dB) using three 15" transducers in a dual-chamber bandpass enclosure.

Each cabinet is a single 2.7 ohm passive load needing one SB amplifier channel; because 2.7 ohms sits at the amplifier minimum-impedance floor, an LA8 drives at most 4 dV-SUB (1 per output, 4 total per the LA8 drive-capacity table). LA4, LA4X and LA12X are also supported.

Choose the crossover by preset: [dV-S_X] / [dV-S_60_X] (200 Hz LPF) to pair with V-DOSC/dV-DOSC [_X] tops, or [dV-S_100] / [dV-S_60_100] (100 Hz) for compact use; the [dV_dV-S_xx] hybrids drive the sub and dV-DOSC together from one controller.
A single speakON socket is fitted on purpose - never daisy-chain dV-SUBs, as paralleling would pull the load below the 2.7 ohm floor; feed each sub on its own cable.

When flown, the dV-SUB always hangs on top of the dV-DOSC, never below: up to 12 dV-DOSC + 4 dV-SUB on a single pick point, or a dV-SUB-only column up to 6 deep ground-stacked or flown on its integral steel rigging with dV-ANGLESS / dV-ANGLESD bars and dV-PIN25 pins.

Always model the array in SOUNDVISION before rigging; the box has no published IP rating (weather-resistant transducers only) and no pole-mount or dedicated ground-stack pole accessory - it ground-stacks via integral runners.
source_manual: dV-DOSC dV-SUB User Manual (EN) V3.0, June 2005 (dV_UM_EN_3-0.pdf, 150 pp); dV-SUB datasheet rev. dVS_SP_EN_1.0/02-09 (Feb 2009); L-Acoustics Amplified Controllers Preset Guide v5.5.1
